name: t5-inherit-missing-manifest-fallback
description: TRIGGER CONDITIONS: T5 inheritance crash with 'ValueError: config_manifest.json not found' when running with --retry-errors. Use when: (1) all subtests in a parent tier scored 0.0 and tiebreaker selected a subtest whose run failed before _save_resource_manifest() executed, (2) build_merged_baseline() raises on a missing config_manifest.json. Fix: replace hard raise with sorted-sibling fallback; skip tier entirely (with warning) if no subtest has a manifest.
